positions.label: Rudel's Gruppe in the Stalingrad fighting
Sortie rate climbing as the pocket forms

summary: I. Gruppe of StG 2 was the dive-bomber group in which Hans-Ulrich Rudel flew at Stalingrad. A Gruppe fielded roughly 30–40 Ju 87s across three Staffeln and was the basic operational building block of a Stuka Geschwader.
notes: Tier-2 drill-down: renders on the map only when StG 2 or this group is selected. Pilot coverage: Stalingrad.
